signals.title: U.S. sent Iran 15-point plan to end war, report says; Trump says 'in negotiations right now'
signals.body: "Operation Epic Fury continues unabated" to achieve President Donald Trump's military objectives, White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt said.

signals.title: Recession odds climb on Wall Street as economy shows cracks beneath the surface
signals.body: Economists have pulled up their risk assessments of a contraction amid heightened uncertainty over geopolitical risk and a labor market slump.

signals.title: Private credit’s ‘zero-loss fantasy’ is coming to an end as defaults and fund exits rise
signals.body: Private credit is expected to see a surge in defaults as investors continue to pull money from the sector.

signals.title: Meta makes 'big bet' on top leaders with stock options as pressure builds to catch up in AI
signals.body: Meta is granting stock options to top executives as pressure on the company intensifies in the AI battle.

signals.title: OpenAI raises additional money to bring record funding round to $120 billion, CFO tells Cramer
signals.body: The fresh capital brings OpenAI's historic fundraise to $120 billion, exceeding the ChatGPT creator's initial target of $100 billion.

signals.title: Meta must pay $375 million for violating New Mexico law in child exploitation case, jury rules
signals.body: Jury reaches a verdict in New Mexico trial in which the state's attorney general alleged that Meta failed to safeguard its family of apps from child predators.

signals.title: Arm stock pops 6% as CEO Haas issues $15 billion revenue expectation for new chip
signals.body: Arm unveiled its first in-house chip on Tuesday at an event in San Francisco, with Meta as the initial customer.

signals.title: Judge presses DOD on why Anthropic was blacklisted: 'That seems a pretty low bar'
signals.body: The Defense Department designated Anthropic as a risk to U.S. national security, the first time an American company had been hit with that designation.

signals.title: Pop Mart shares plunge over 22% as concerns over sustainability of Labubu sales dwarf stellar results
signals.body: the Beijing-based toy maker posted annual revenue of 37.1 billion yuan ($5.4 billion) for 2025, up 185% from a year earlier, just shy of LSEG estimates of 38 billion yuan.

signals.title: What comes after Labubu? Inside Pop Mart’s next grow play
signals.body: Pop Mart is betting on films, theme parks and global expansion to turn Labubu into a lasting franchise, even as the initial craze fades.

signals.title: OpenAI shutters short-form video app Sora as company reels in costs
signals.body: OpenAI said it's closing Sora, the short-form video app that went viral after its launch six months ago

signals.title: It’s not just oil and gas. The Strait of Hormuz blockage is rattling another vital commodity
signals.body: “I'm a lot more concerned about the current crisis than I was when Russia-Ukraine happened four years ago,” one fund manager told CNBC.

signals.title: Emily Gregory projected to win Florida special election to represent Trump, Mar-a-Lago
signals.body: President Donald Trump had endorsed fellow Republican Jon Maples in the special election against Emily Gregory, the Democratic nominee.

signals.title: SK Hynix files confidentially for U.S. listing as it rides 'unprecedented growth' in memory market
signals.body: SK Hynix has made a confidential filing for a potential listing in the U.S. this year, as the company looks to expand production.

signals.title: Denmark’s PM Frederiksen suffers election setback after standing up to Trump over Greenland
signals.body: Frederiksen had sought to capitalize on popular support after standing up to Trump's push to annex Greenland, a self-governing Danish territory.

signals.title: South Korea braces for 'worst-case scenarios' as Iran oil shock deepens
signals.body: South Korean Prime Minister Kim Min-seok warned the government must prepare for "worst-case scenarios" stemming from the Middle East conflict.

signals.title: Home Depot makes another pro deal — plus, what's behind Corning's big rally
signals.body: Every weekday, the Investing Club releases the Homestretch; an actionable afternoon update just in time for the last hour of trading.

signals.title: Venezuela opposition leader María Corina Machado calls for full privatization of oil industry
signals.body: Machado's remarks come as the oil industry remains hesitant to invest in Venezuela after the U.S. ousted former President Nicolas Maduro.

signals.title: Asia-Pacific stocks rise as Trump comments signal de-escalation in Iran conflict
signals.body: Trump said he decided to back off from his recent threat to order strikes on Iranian energy infrastructure "based on the fact we're negotiating."

signals.title: World has 'never experienced' soaring refining margins like this, TotalEnergies CEO tells CNBC
signals.body: TotalEnergies CEO Patrick Pouyanné on the Iran war, the $1 billion deal with the White House, investment in the U.S., and more.

signals.title: Pakistan offers to facilitate U.S.-Iran war talks as Trump and Tehran give mixed signals
signals.body: Trump said top U.S. negotiators and their Iranian counterparts have been engaged in "very, very strong talks," but Tehran has denied that claim.

signals.title: Kuwait says Strait of Hormuz closure is beyond catastrophic, will trigger domino effect across global economy
signals.body: Iran is holding the world economy hostage by blockading the Strait of Hormuz, said Sheikh Nawaf al-Sabah, the CEO of Kuwait Petroleum Corp.

signals.title: Jamie Dimon says Iran war makes Middle East peace prospects better in the long term
signals.body: JPMorgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon issued an optimistic viewpoint on Middle East peace, weeks into the war with Iran.

signals.title: Arm releases first in-house chip, with Meta as debut customer
signals.body: Arm is making its first CPU, pivoting from only licensing its architecture to giants like Apple, Nvidia, Amazon and Google. CNBC got an exclusive first look.

signals.title: Amazon acquires 'approachable' humanoid maker Fauna Robotics
signals.body: Fauna's first product, called Sprout, is a $50,000 bipedal robot that's 3 feet, 6 inches tall and designed to be "approachable and human-friendly."

signals.title: Dow Jones Futures Rise, Oil Prices Tumble On U.S. Peace Plan To Iran; 7 Stocks To Watch
signals.body: Futures rose and oil prices fell as the U.S. reportedly sent a peace plan to Iran. President Trump said Tehran is "talking sense."

signals.title: US Stock Market Today: S&P 500 Futures Climb As Inflation And Energy Jitters Linger
signals.body: The Morning Bull - US Market Morning Update Wednesday, Mar, 25 2026 US stock futures are pointing higher this morning, with E mini S&P 500 contracts up about 1% and Nasdaq 100 futures ahead by a little more than 1%. The backdrop is a mix of easing geopolitical worry and stubborn inflation risk. US 10 year Treasury yields are around 4.4%, which is relatively high and reflects worries that interest rates may stay elevated, especially as energy costs keep pressure on prices. signals.title: Morning Brief: 3 factors have made for big historical stock market losses
signals.body: In addition to monitoring the Iran situation, we're watching software stocks as Anthropic's new capacities may put them back into the hot seat.

signals.title: 3 factors have driven double-digit stock market losses in the last 100 years. They're all in play.
signals.body: In the relatively rare instances where stocks have seen declines greater than 10% in a calendar year, one of three reasons has been the trigger. The problem for investors right now is that all three are in play.

signals.title: Trending tickers: Arm, Circle, Asos and Crest Nicholson
signals.body: The latest investor updates on stocks that are trending on Wednesday.

signals.title: 1 Healthcare Stock to Consider Right Now and 2 We Turn Down
signals.body: Personal health and wellness is one of the many secular tailwinds for healthcare companies. Those leading the charge have not only realized strong financial performance but also propelled the broader industry’s returns as healthcare stocks have gained 4.4% over the past six months. This was a good place to be as the S&P 500 was stuck in neutral.

signals.title: Uh-Oh! One of the Most Bearish Stock Market Signals Just Triggered.
signals.body: Who knew crossing a simple line in the sand could make such a dramatic difference in stock market returns?

signals.title: FTSE 100 LIVE: Stocks rise on reports of Trump offering 15-point ceasefire plan to Iran
signals.body: The plan was submitted to Iran by intermediaries from Pakistan, who have offered to host renewed negotiations between Washington and Tehran.

signals.title: Markets Rebound. Stock Futures Surge, Oil Slumps on Iran Peace Talk Hopes.
signals.body: Stocks looked set to rebound Wednesday after the U.S. sent Iran a 15-point plan to end the conflict, raising investors' hopes that there is progress in cease-fire talks to end the conflict in the Middle East.  The three major indexes all dropped on Tuesday as the software selloff resumed in the absence of much news about the Iran war.  Brent international futures fell 3.9% to $96.29 a barrel and West Texas Intermediate U.S. futures slid 3.5% to $89.10 a barrel.

signals.title: 1 Software Stock for Long-Term Investors and 2 We Turn Down
signals.body: Software is eating the world, and virtually no business is left untouched by it. This secular theme makes SaaS companies attractive investment candidates but also comes with higher valuations that cause volatility. Unfortunately, the rich prices have haunted them over the past six months as the industry has shed 25.2%. This drop was especially disheartening since the S&P 500 held its ground.

signals.title: 3 Industrials Stocks We Think Twice About
signals.body: Whether you see them or not, industrials businesses play a crucial part in our daily activities. They are also bound to benefit from a friendlier regulatory environment with the Trump administration, and this excitement has led to a six-month gain of 7.7% for the sector. Investing here would have been wise - at the same time, the S&P 500 was flat.

signals.title: 3 Financials Stocks with Solid Fundamentals
signals.body: Financial firms serve as the backbone of the economy, providing essential services from lending and investment management to risk management and payment processing. Still, investors are uneasy as companies face challenges from an unpredictable interest rate and inflation environment. These doubts have caused the industry to lag recently as financials stocks have collectively shed 10.2% over the past six months. This performance was discouraging since the S&P 500 stood firm.

signals.title: The S&P 500 Is on Track to Finish Q1 in Negative Territory. Here's What History Suggests Comes Next.
signals.body: The end of 2026 could be better than its beginning, if history is a guide.

signals.body: Lockheed Martin, Apple and others highlight how investors navigate war-driven volatility with defense, commodities and long-term equity strategies.

signals.body: By Tom Westbrook SINGAPORE, March 25 (Reuters) - Stocks rose and oil fell on Wednesday on reports the U.S. is seeking a month-long ceasefire in its war on Iran, and had sent a 15-point plan to Iran

signals.title: 3 Reasons to Avoid GBX and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
signals.body: While the broader market has struggled with the S&P 500 down 1.9% since September 2025, Greenbrier has surged ahead as its stock price has climbed by 14.5% to $51.94 per share. This was partly thanks to its solid quarterly results, and the performance may have investors wondering how to approach the situation.

Indian court says ‘no case’ against CoinDCX founders in impersonation fraud
signals.body: A Thane judge granted bail to CoinDCX co-founders Sumit Surendra Gupta and Niraj Ashok Khandelwal, finding no case against them.

signals.title: Ripple joins Singapore sandbox to test RLUSD in trade finance
signals.body: Ripple joined the Monetary Authority of Singapore’s BLOOM initiative with Unloq to test RLUSD and XRPL for programmable cross-border trade settlement in Singapore.

signals.title: Irish police open Bitcoin wallet years after keys were apparently lost
signals.body: A crypto wallet tied to a convicted drug dealer thought to have lost his wallet keys transferred 500 Bitcoin to Coinbase on Tuesday.

signals.title: Bitcoin exchange outflows show ‘genuine accumulation by investors’: Analyst
signals.body: Ongoing accumulation of Bitcoin is likely one of the factors behind why the cryptocurrency is trading in a tight range, say crypto analysts.

signals.title: Pharma firm Enlivex raises $21M for prediction market Rain token treasury
signals.body: Enlivex says it acquired 3 billion Rain tokens at a discount and extended its option to purchase billions more discounted tokens until late next year.

signals.title: Robinhood announces $1.5B share buyback as stock struggles in 2026
signals.body: Shares in Robinhood fell to their lowest level this year on Tuesday as crypto and tech stocks are battered by geopolitical headwinds.

signals.title: OpenAI kills off AI video app Sora after 6 months
signals.body: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman reportedly said all its text-to-video models would be shuttered, and a $1 billion investment from Disney has also been cancelled.

signals.title: Ethereum devs up security efforts with new ‘Post-Quantum’ team
signals.body: The Ethereum Foundation-linked Post-Quantum team says while the quantum threat isn’t imminent, deploying a full solution without disrupting the network will take years.

signals.title: Rising US Treasury yields, war in Iran, rising inflation risk pressure Bitcoin price
signals.body: Falling tech stock prices and rising bond yields have forced a rush for cash, preventing Bitcoin from gaining any bullish momentum.

signals.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
signals.body: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

signals.title: 21shares sees active strategies shaping next phase of crypto ETFs
signals.body: 21shares president Duncan Moir sees shifting investor demand and evolving product strategies pushing crypto ETFs and ETPs beyond passive exposure.

signals.title: Circle taps African fintech Sasai to expand USDC adoption in cross-border payments
signals.body: The move aims to integrate the second-biggest dollar-pegged stablecoin into regional payment networks to improve cross-border transactions and remittances.

signals.title: CFTC chief launches innovation task force focused on crypto framework
signals.body: The task force will work with industry participants to develop regulatory approaches for crypto, AI and prediction markets.

signals.title: Lombard taps Bitwise to offer Bitcoin yield and lending to institutional custody
signals.body: Lombard CEO Jacob Phillips announced at the Digital Asset Summit that the platform enables institutions to earn yield and borrow against Bitcoin without moving assets out of custody.

signals.title: Bitcoin holders shift from panic to cash-buffer discipline as volatility deepens
signals.body: Bitcoin volatility rose as stablecoin flows surged to $440 billion over the weekend, highlighting investors’ pivot to cash as BTC spot and futures activity decreased.

signals.title: Tether says ‘Big Four‘ firm to handle first full audit of USDT reserves
signals.body: The long-anticipated audit could address years of scrutiny over Tether’s reserve disclosures, though the company has not named the accounting firm.

signals.title: BitGo, Susquehanna open OTC prediction markets trading to institutions
signals.body: The offering allows institutional investors to trade event-based contracts using crypto collateral, as regulatory scrutiny of prediction markets intensifies in the United States.

signals.title: Bitcoin hints at ‘regime shift’ as BTC price dips to $69.5K on Iran nerves
signals.body: Bitcoin fell below $70,000 amid geopolitical tensions, while analysts pointed to early signs of a potential structural shift in market behavior.

signals.title: Ethereum price rally pauses at $2.2K: What will trigger breakout?
signals.body: A resurgence in institutional demand and spot ETF inflow return could put Ethereum price in a better position to overcome the next hurdle at $2,200.

signals.title: Fira launches fixed-rate DeFi lending market with $450M in deposits
signals.body: Fira debuted its fixed-rate DeFi lending protocol with $450 million in pre-launch deposits, seeking to make long-term decentralized lending rates more predictable.

signals.title: Resolv temporarily halts protocol to ‘contain the impact’ of 80M USR exploit
signals.body: Resolv’s USR dollar stablecoin is trading at just $0.24 after an attacker minted 80 million unbacked tokens, forcing a full protocol pause and reopening fears over stablecoin risk.

signals.title: Federal regulation looms as 11 states go after prediction markets
signals.body: Kalshi is facing off with state regulators around the US, who claim that prediction markets are a form of gambling and recognize that they are a significant source of potential revenue.

signals.title: NYSE taps Securitize for 24/7 tokenized securities platform
signals.body: Securitize will become NYSE’s first digital transfer agent to mint blockchain-based shares of stocks and develop standards for compliant tokenized stock issuance.

signals.title: Solana lands Mastercard, Western Union on new dev platform
signals.body: Solana is aiming to attract enterprises and financial institutions to its ecosystem through a new unified developer platform, which is focused on tokenization and stablecoins.

signals.title: Why Mastercard is buying stablecoin infrastructure instead of a token
signals.body: Mastercard’s planned BVNK acquisition highlights a shift toward infrastructure over token issuance, reflecting how major payment firms are approaching stablecoins.
